requirement_topic.en: DES Grid Connection for BESS — 230/400 V 50 Hz System and Connection Approval Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: DES BESS并网——230/400 V 50 Hz系统及并网审批要求
requirement_topic.zht: DES BESS併網——230/400 V 50 Hz系統及併網審批要求

summary.en: The Department of Electrical Services (DES), under the Ministry of Energy and Industry, is the primary electricity authority and grid-connection regulator in Brunei Darussalam. Berakas Power Company (BPC) operates as the utility under DES oversight. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale and behind-the-meter projects — require DES technical review and grid-connection approval before commissioning. Brunei's grid operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz (230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, configured, and validated for Brunei's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid parameters. No publicly confirmed standalone DES technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been identified as of the dataset date; project-specific connection terms must be obtained directly from DES at the earliest project stage. IEC 62933 series standards (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) are the internationally expected reference for BESS grid integration technical requirements and may be referenced in project specifications or DES connection conditions.
summary.zh: 电力服务局（DES）隶属于能源工业部，是文莱的主要电力主管机关及并网连接监管机构。Berakas Power Company（BPC）在DES监管下作为电力运营商。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模和表后项目——在调试前均须取得DES技术审查和并网批准。文莱电网运行参数为230/400 V 50 Hz（单相230 V、三相400 V）。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须针对文莱230/400 V 50 Hz电网参数进行设计、配置和验证。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认DES公开发布专门针对BESS并网的独立技术规格；项目专属并网条款须在项目最早阶段直接向DES获取。IEC 62933系列标准（电化学储能系统）是BESS电网集成技术要求的国际预期参考依据，可能在项目规格或DES并网条件中被引用。
summary.zht: 電力服務局（DES）隸屬於能源工業部，是汶萊的主要電力主管機關及併網連接監管機構。Berakas Power Company（BPC）在DES監管下作為電力運營商。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模和表後項目——在調試前均須取得DES技術審查和併網批准。汶萊電網運行參數為230/400 V 50 Hz（單相230 V、三相400 V）。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須針對汶萊230/400 V 50 Hz電網參數進行設計、配置和驗證。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認DES公開發布專門針對BESS併網的獨立技術規格；項目專屬併網條款須在項目最早階段直接向DES獲取。IEC 62933系列標準（電化學儲能系統）是BESS電網集成技術要求的國際預期參考依據，可能在項目規格或DES併網條件中被引用。

standards_or_laws: Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Energy and Industry, Brunei Darussalam — mandatory grid-connection approval authority for all grid-connected BESS
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
Brunei grid standard: 230/400 V 50 Hz (230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — different from Brunei's 230/400 V. PCS firmware, voltage protection thresholds, and ride-through settings configured for China's 220/380 V grid must be re-parameterised and retested for Brunei's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid conditions before DES grid-connection testing and commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与文莱230/400 V不同。针对中国220/380 V电网配置的PCS固件、电压保护阈值和穿越参数，须在DES并网测试和调试前重新针对文莱230/400 V 50 Hz电网条件进行参数配置和重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與汶萊230/400 V不同。針對中國220/380 V電網配置的PCS韌體、電壓保護閾值和穿越參數，須在DES併網測試和調試前重新針對汶萊230/400 V 50 Hz電網條件進行參數配置和重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy DES Brunei grid-connection requirements. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Brunei is 230/400 V whereas China is 220/380 V; PCS voltage protection thresholds and ride-through settings must be reconfigured and retested for Brunei's grid parameters; (b) no publicly confirmed DES technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection — engage DES at the earliest project stage to obtain applicable technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications or DES require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly, as Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA/communication interface protocol required by DES or BPC for BESS monitoring before equipment procurement; (e) Brunei's storage sector is nascent — allow additional time for DES regulatory engagement and technical review compared to more established markets.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足DES文莱并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——文莱为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V；PCS电压保护阈值和穿越参数须重新配置并重新测试以符合文莱电网参数；（b）目前无公开确认的DES专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与DES接触以获取适用技术要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格或DES要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件，中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）通信协议——在设备采购前确认DES或BPC对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议；（e）文莱储能行业尚处起步阶段——与成熟市场相比，须为DES法规接触和技术审查预留额外时间。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足DES汶萊併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——汶萊為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V；PCS電壓保護閾值和穿越參數須重新配置並重新測試以符合汶萊電網參數；（b）目前無公開確認的DES專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與DES接觸以獲取適用技術要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格或DES要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件，中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）通訊協議——在設備採購前確認DES或BPC對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議；（e）汶萊儲能行業尚處起步階段——與成熟市場相比，須為DES法規接觸和技術審查預留額外時間。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DES grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Brunei; no publicly confirmed BESS-specific technical specification as of dataset date — direct DES engagement is essential
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Brunei

source.publisher: Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Energy and Industry, Brunei Darussalam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy DES Brunei grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Brunei's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid. Engage DES at the earliest project stage to determine connection technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications. No publicly confirmed DES technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been identified as of the dataset date — direct DES engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised. Brunei's storage sector is nascent; allow additional time for regulatory review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足DES文莱并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对文莱230/400 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置。应在项目最早阶段与DES接触，确定并网技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议规格。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认DES公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备采购最终确定前，直接与DES接触至关重要。文莱储能行业尚处起步阶段，须预留额外时间进行监管审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足DES汶萊併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對汶萊230/400 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置。應在項目最早階段與DES接觸，確定併網技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議規格。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認DES公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備採購最終確定前，直接與DES接觸至關重要。汶萊儲能行業尚處起步階段，須預留額外時間進行監管審查。

requirement_topic.en: Power Quality and Grid Code Compliance — Harmonic, Power Factor, and Islanding Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 电能质量和电网规范合规——谐波、功率因数及孤岛要求
requirement_topic.zht: 電能質量和電網規範合規——諧波、功率因數及孤島要求

summary.en: BESS connected to Brunei's grid must comply with applicable power quality standards referenced by DES and BPC in connection conditions. Brunei follows British/IEC electrical installation standards, and power quality requirements for connected generation and storage assets are expected to reference IEC 61000 series (Electromagnetic Compatibility) standards, including IEC 61000-3-2 (harmonic current limits) and IEC 61000-3-11 / IEC 61000-3-12 (voltage fluctuation and flicker). Anti-islanding protection (preventing the BESS from energising the grid during a utility outage) is a standard grid-safety requirement that PCS firmware must implement per DES connection conditions. Specific power quality limits and anti-islanding detection requirements must be confirmed directly with DES before equipment specification is finalised, as no publicly confirmed Brunei BESS grid-code technical document has been identified as of the dataset date.
summary.zh: 接入文莱电网的BESS须遵守DES和BPC在并网条件中引用的适用电能质量标准。文莱沿用英国/IEC电气安装标准，接入发电和储能资产的电能质量要求预计将参照IEC 61000系列（电磁兼容）标准，包括IEC 61000-3-2（谐波电流限值）和IEC 61000-3-11/IEC 61000-3-12（电压波动和闪变）。防孤岛保护（防止BESS在电网停电期间向电网充电）是标准电网安全要求，PCS固件须按DES并网条件实施。由于截至本数据集日期尚未确认文莱BESS电网规范技术文件，具体电能质量限值和防孤岛检测要求须在设备规格最终确定前直接向DES确认。
summary.zht: 接入汶萊電網的BESS須遵守DES和BPC在併網條件中引用的適用電能質量標準。汶萊沿用英國/IEC電氣安裝標準，接入發電和儲能資產的電能質量要求預計將參照IEC 61000系列（電磁兼容）標準，包括IEC 61000-3-2（諧波電流限值）和IEC 61000-3-11/IEC 61000-3-12（電壓波動和閃變）。防孤島保護（防止BESS在電網停電期間向電網充電）是標準電網安全要求，PCS韌體須按DES併網條件實施。由於截至本數據集日期尚未確認汶萊BESS電網規範技術文件，具體電能質量限值和防孤島檢測要求須在設備規格最終確定前直接向DES確認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic Compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment input current up to 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000-3-11 — Electromagnetic Compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker in public low-voltage supply systems (equipment with rated current up to 75 A)
IEC 61000-3-12 — Electromagnetic Compatibility — Limits for harmonic currents for equipment with rated current greater than 16 A and up to and including 75 A
DES connection conditions (Brunei) — power quality and anti-islanding requirements for grid-connected BESS; specific document not publicly confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with DES

summary.en: Chinese BESS power quality requirements are governed by GB/T 36558-2023, which sets harmonic, power factor, and anti-islanding requirements for grid-connected BESS in China. Chinese PCS products are tested to GB/T standards by NEA-authorised laboratories. Chinese EMC compliance is typically assessed to GB 17625 (harmonics) and GB/T 17626 series (immunity), which are aligned with but not identical to the IEC 61000 series. Chinese anti-islanding protection requirements are defined in grid-connection technical standards but may differ in detection method and threshold from Brunei/IEC requirements. Chinese GB/T power quality certificates are not accepted as equivalent to Brunei DES connection condition compliance.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电能质量要求由GB/T 36558-2023管控，规定了中国并网BESS的谐波、功率因数和防孤岛要求。中国PCS产品由NEA授权实验室依据GB/T标准进行测试。中国EMC合规通常依据GB 17625（谐波）和GB/T 17626系列（抗扰度）进行评估，与IEC 61000系列协调但不完全相同。中国防孤岛保护要求在并网技术标准中规定，但检测方法和阈值可能与文莱/IEC要求不同。中国GB/T电能质量证书不被接受为等同于文莱DES并网条件合规。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電能質量要求由GB/T 36558-2023管控，規定了中國併網BESS的諧波、功率因數和防孤島要求。中國PCS產品由NEA授權實驗室依據GB/T標準進行測試。中國EMC合規通常依據GB 17625（諧波）和GB/T 17626系列（抗擾度）進行評估，與IEC 61000系列協調但不完全相同。中國防孤島保護要求在併網技術標準中規定，但檢測方法和閾值可能與汶萊/IEC要求不同。中國GB/T電能質量證書不被接受為等同於汶萊DES併網條件合規。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (includes power quality and anti-islanding requirements for grid-connected BESS in China)
GB 17625.1 — 电磁兼容 限值 第1部分: 谐波电流发射限值 (harmonics; aligned with but not identical to IEC 61000-3-2)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters; includes power quality test procedures)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T power quality and EMC certifications for BESS PCS do not satisfy DES Brunei connection condition requirements. Key gaps: (a) confirm applicable power quality limits (harmonic, flicker, power factor) with DES or BPC before equipment procurement — no publicly confirmed Brunei BESS grid-code document exists; (b) anti-islanding detection — confirm the required detection method (passive, active, or combined) and detection threshold with DES; Chinese PCS anti-islanding settings may need reconfiguration for Brunei's grid; (c) IEC 61000 series evidence — where DES connection conditions reference IEC 61000 EMC standards, Chinese GB EMC certificates may not be accepted and retesting to IEC 61000 by an accredited laboratory may be required; (d) Brunei's 230/400 V grid may result in different steady-state voltage conditions compared to China 220/380 V — confirm PCS steady-state operating range covers Brunei's voltage tolerances.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS PCS电能质量和EMC认证不满足DES文莱并网条件要求。主要差距：（a）在设备采购前向DES或BPC确认适用电能质量限值（谐波、闪变、功率因数）——目前无公开确认的文莱BESS电网规范文件；（b）防孤岛检测——向DES确认所要求的检测方法（被动、主动或组合）和检测阈值；中国PCS防孤岛设置可能需要为文莱电网重新配置；（c）IEC 61000系列证据——若DES并网条件引用IEC 61000 EMC标准，中国GB EMC证书可能不被接受，可能需要由认可实验室重新依据IEC 61000进行测试；（d）文莱230/400 V电网与中国220/380 V相比可能导致不同的稳态电压条件——确认PCS稳态工作范围覆盖文莱电压容差。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS PCS電能質量和EMC認證不滿足DES汶萊併網條件要求。主要差距：（a）在設備採購前向DES或BPC確認適用電能質量限值（諧波、閃變、功率因數）——目前無公開確認的汶萊BESS電網規範文件；（b）防孤島檢測——向DES確認所要求的檢測方法（被動、主動或組合）和檢測閾值；中國PCS防孤島設置可能需要為汶萊電網重新配置；（c）IEC 61000系列證據——若DES併網條件引用IEC 61000 EMC標準，中國GB EMC證書可能不被接受，可能需要由認可實驗室重新依據IEC 61000進行測試；（d）汶萊230/400 V電網與中國220/380 V相比可能導致不同的穩態電壓條件——確認PCS穩態工作範圍覆蓋汶萊電壓容差。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DES connection conditions govern power quality and anti-islanding for all grid-connected BESS in Brunei; specific technical requirements must be confirmed directly with DES as no publicly confirmed BESS grid-code document exists
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 power quality and anti-islanding requirements apply to all grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Brunei

source.publisher: Department of Electrical Services (DES), Ministry of Energy and Industry, Brunei Darussalam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T power quality and EMC certifications for BESS PCS are not accepted as equivalent to Brunei DES connection condition requirements. Confirm applicable power quality limits, anti-islanding detection requirements, and EMC evidence requirements directly with DES before finalising PCS specification. Allow time for DES regulatory engagement — Brunei's BESS sector is nascent and no publicly confirmed grid-code technical document for BESS exists as of the dataset date.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS PCS电能质量和EMC认证不被接受为等同于文莱DES并网条件要求。在最终确定PCS规格前，直接向DES确认适用电能质量限值、防孤岛检测要求及EMC证据要求。预留时间进行DES监管接触——文莱BESS行业尚处起步阶段，截至本数据集日期无公开确认的BESS电网规范技术文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS PCS電能質量和EMC認證不被接受為等同於汶萊DES併網條件要求。在最終確定PCS規格前，直接向DES確認適用電能質量限值、防孤島檢測要求及EMC證據要求。預留時間進行DES監管接觸——汶萊BESS行業尚處起步階段，截至本數據集日期無公開確認的BESS電網規範技術文件。
